evals.prompt: 给我做一个 Codex 版 /insights：看最近 30 个本地 Codex sessions，总结我最常做的工作、卡点、以及哪些 workflow 应该沉淀成 skill 或 automation。
evals.expected_output: A concise evidence-backed report using local Codex history, separating raw sessions from workflow recommendations.

evals.prompt: Audit my recent Codex runs under /Users/zeeland/projects/rudder-oss and tell me whether a new skill is warranted or if existing skills should be optimized instead.
evals.expected_output: A scoped Codex insights report filtered to the requested cwd with conservative new-skill recommendations.

evals.prompt: Generate a quick Codex usage insights report for this month and save the artifacts somewhere under /tmp so I can inspect the evidence.
evals.expected_output: A report path and JSON artifact path plus a short summary of sources, analyzed sessions, patterns, and friction points.
